creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 168960
shar with new port mail/rubygem-premailer-rails

Hello,

attached a shar with the new port. This port is a prerequisite of the www/gitlab update. Also it depends on mail/rubygem-premailer and brings the functionality of the port to Rails.

Buildtests are done for 9.3, 10.0, 10.1, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. Also a runtime test with www/gitlab was done. All is fine :)

Greetings,
Torsten
